## Source: ossf-package-analysis (82508ccb87ec67c0980aab22344944dc04b3526af72b41f9d9e7092c50c3b9c4)
The OpenSSF Package Analysis project identified 'driftwood-client' @ 0.0.1.r1319997b9 (rubygems) as malicious.

It is considered malicious because:

- The package executes one or more commands associated with malicious behavior.
